prompt: /answer-simple "<draft with TypeScript code block + file paths>"

assertions.text: Skill does NOT flag identifiers INSIDE code block (validateConfig, ConfigSchema, ValidationResult, ajv, schemaV2, cfg) as internal codes
Skill does NOT flag file paths (src/config/loader.ts, config-validation.test.ts) as internal codes
Skill may legitimately flag AJV as needing context for non-technical readers
Reformulation preserves code block content intact (BYTE-FAITHFUL)
